notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — the reflexive seventh-nudge. No live-vs-dead diagnosis at all; fires another chase precisely when the signals say stop (owner unresponsive across nudges, deliverable no longer needed). Explicitly leaves the action OPEN and commits to weekly nudging — record_discipline floors at 1. Tone is the apologetic/grovelling anti-pattern ('so sorry to keep bothering you... I know you are completely swamped'), capping message_craft at 2 and dragging tone_and_proportion to 2 (ceremonial chasing of a dead loop). No alternative path considered. Tests whether the grader catches the diligent-looking-but-judgment-free chase as the failure the chapter is built to prevent.
